action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py is too slow (~10s/object, 100 objects = 1000s). The batch approach failed with OOM when chunk_size=0. Per-view works but is slow. Analysis: I need to batch all 11 views' rays [11*H*W, 3] but use chunk_size=131072 to avoid OOM. The renderer processes rays in chunks, so large ray batches are fine with chunking. Also use fp16. The '65535 vs 65536' error in batch mode was due to padding - I already have padding code. Decision: Fix predict.py to batch all 11 views at once with chunk_size=131072 and fp16, which should give ~5-8x speedup.
